headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Dividend Raise Streak is 18 Years. Here's 1 Number That Says the Streak Will Continue.
summary: "Productivity initiatives" could prove key in maintaining this pharma company's decades-long dividend growth streak.

headline: Takeda Designed A Psoriasis Pill Using AI. It Just Walloped Bristol's Sotyktu In A Head-To-Head Test.
summary: Takeda said Thursday its AI-designed psoriasis pill, zasocitinib, easily beat Bristol's Sotyktu in a head-to-head study.

raw.headline: Takeda Designed A Psoriasis Pill Using AI. It Just Walloped Bristol's Sotyktu In A Head-To-Head Test.
raw.summary: Takeda said Thursday its AI-designed psoriasis pill, zasocitinib, easily beat Bristol's Sotyktu in a head-to-head study.

headline: Takeda AI-Drug Shows Superior Skin Clearance Against Bristol-Myers' Med
summary: Takeda's psoriasis drug zasocitinib outperformed Bristol Myers Squibb's Sotyktu in a Phase 3 study, showing higher skin clearance rates.

raw.headline: Takeda AI-Drug Shows Superior Skin Clearance Against Bristol-Myers' Med
raw.summary: Takeda's psoriasis drug zasocitinib outperformed Bristol Myers Squibb's Sotyktu in a Phase 3 study, showing higher skin clearance rates.

headline: Takeda’s $4B TYK2 drug tops Bristol Myers’ Sotyktu in head-to-head test
summary: The results support Takeda’s long-held belief in zasocitinib’s superiority and could help it gain a commercial advantage over Bristol’s therapy.

raw.headline: Takeda’s $4B TYK2 drug tops Bristol Myers’ Sotyktu in head-to-head test
raw.summary: The results support Takeda’s long-held belief in zasocitinib’s superiority and could help it gain a commercial advantage over Bristol’s therapy.

headline: Harbour BioMed Appoints Dr. Luisa Salter-Cid as Scientific Advisor
summary: Harbour BioMed (the "Company"; HKEX: 02142), a global biopharmaceutical company committed to the discovery and development of novel antibody therapeutics in immunology, oncology and other disease areas, today announced the appointment of Dr. Luisa Salter-Cid as Scientific Advisor.
